Legal conditions

Welcome to Conquer English Academy.

Terms and Conditions.


By accessing our website and enrolling in our courses, you agree to comply with and be bound by the following terms and conditions. Please read them carefully.
1. Enrollment and Payment
Registration: Enrollment is confirmed only upon receipt of the full course fee or a non-refundable deposit as specified for the chosen program. Payment Methods: We accept payments via [Credit/Debit Card, PayPal, Bank Transfer]. All fees must be paid in Euro unless otherwise stated. Prerequisites: Students are responsible for ensuring they meet the minimum age and English proficiency requirements for their selected course.
2. Cancellation and Refund Policy
We understand that plans change. Our refund policy is as follows: Cancellations made 14 days or more before the course start date: Full refund minus a 50€ administration fee. Cancellations made within 7 to 13 days of the start date: 50% refund of the total course fee. Late cancellations (less than 7 days): No refund will be issued. Non-attendance: No refunds or credits are provided for missed classes or partial attendance.
3. Course Changes and Cancellations
Conquer English Academy reserves the right to: Change course schedules, teachers, or classroom locations if necessary. Cancel a course if the minimum number of students is not met. In such cases, a full refund or an alternative course will be offered.
4. Intellectual Property
All course materials, including digital content, worksheets, and videos provided on this website or during classes, are the intellectual property of Conquer English Academy. Note: These materials are for personal use only. Unauthorized reproduction, distribution, or resale of our curriculum is strictly prohibited.
5. Code of Conduct
We maintain a professional and respectful learning environment. Conquer English Academy reserves the right to exclude any student whose behavior is disruptive, discriminatory, or violates the safety of our staff and other students without a refund.
6. Limitation of Liability
While we strive for excellence, Conquer English Academy does not guarantee specific results (e.g., passing a specific exam). We are not liable for any technical issues arising from the user's internet connection or hardware during online sessions.
7. Data Protection (GDPR)
Your privacy is important to us. Any personal data collected during registration will be processed in accordance with our Privacy Policy and current data protection laws. We will never sell your information to third parties.
Disclaimer
The information provided on this website is for general informational purposes only. While we endeavor to keep the information up to date and correct, we make no representations or warranties of any kind about the completeness or accuracy of the course descriptions or pricing.

Copyright © 2026 By Gudrun Helga
